I’m sure you’re all aware of the fact that Anni Raid is coming next patch. Let me be clear: we are a highly competitive game, and as such, we do not tolerate anyone not having OE Kath or +12 Pollux. Upon joining the game, each of you was expected to perform efficiently in every anni raid, no matter what, by actively doing 17 hits everyday. Therefore, the community has decided to conduct random inspections during anni and after anni to check whether any Followers have OE Kath or +12 Pollux for the anni raid. If it’s discovered that if they don't have at least OE Kath or +12 Pollux, the follower in question will be flagged for immediate unfollow and referred to the community blacklist. We expect everyone’s full cooperation this anni and going forward. Thank you, and good luck to all.

no its for you 😭 weren't you asking if theres anything you need to know for the different realms

caro (red realm) has two mechanics, embryo fusion and crimson furnace. Crimson Furnace (yellow) is a heal on demand, it gets filled every turn and you click it to heal. Regen and cap scales on your max HP. 

When the baby meter (embryo fusion, circled in red) reaches 100%, an embryo card will be put in your hand. You can either use this card directly to give a specific character aliemus (ult energy) and crit rate, or you can use a caro character's exalt (ultimate) to Devour that baby and activate that ultimate's Devour effects. all caro characters have Devour effects on their exalt

@everyone We’re very sorry that once again we weren’t able to find a Raid event design that satisfies everyone. This time we added auto-battle and level adjustment, lowered the difficulty, increased the rewards, added extra rewards that everyone can obtain after the boss is killed, shortened the overall event duration, and tried to make sure each battle felt different by encouraging team switching.  

Unfortunately, the current number of players and the speed at which they participate are far higher than before. In the past, 30,000 kills could last for nearly three days, but now 50,000 kills are cleared so quickly that it feels terrible for players in different time zones around the world.  

I hope this will be the last time we use this type of event. In the future we’ll need to invest more resources into creating different kinds of events. In the coming days, we will also gradually increase the number of bosses to try to find a more appropriate level and hopefully improve everyone’s experience.  

Please allow me, on behalf of the B.I.A.V.Studio, to once again apologize for the poor experience everyone has had during this event.
